context_note: Germany vs Ivory Coast (Côte d'Ivoire), WC2026 Group C. Germany moderate-to-strong favorite: λ_GER=2.20, λ_CIV=0.97. FTR: Germany 65.58%, Draw 20.21%, CIV 14.09%. Draw=20.21% well below 25% — RULE8 does NOT fire. Open game expected: OU2.5 Over 60.8%, BTTS 55.87%. CIV won AFCON 2023 — NOT a mismatch like Haiti. CIV has Amad Diallo (Man Utd), Yan Diomande, Adingra, Pépé, Kessié. Germany has Havertz (liquid), Musiala (liquid), Wirtz (liquid). 2+ offsides family applies to CIV (14.09% underdog, organized defense expected, non-blowout match).

Cards_OU3_5.note: Only Under 3.5 illiq available; Over est from 1-Under/0.945

rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw=20.21% well below 25% threshold. Normal estimation applies.
rules_applied.Q6_2plus_offsides_family_CIV: CIV win prob 14.09% — in the 10-30% defensive underdog zone. Match is NOT a blowout risk (GER 65%, draw 20%). Non-chasing, organized defensive setup expected. Apply LOW estimate from 2+ offsides family. λ_CIV_goals=0.966, λ_CIV_off estimated 0.4-0.6. P(≥2|0.5)=0.090. Floor + organization discount → 0.18.
rules_applied.Q4_revised_offsides_GER: GER is the attacking favorite (65.58%) — NOT the defensive-underdog family. Price from model. λ_GER_goals=2.20 → λ_GER_off≈1.4. P(≥2|1.4)=0.408. Mild NO lean vs crowd ~0.50.
rules_applied.Q1_fouls_proxy: No direct most fouls market. Use cards proxy: Most cards CIV=0.5328, cards handicap CIV>GER=0.5408. CIV as underdog expected to foul more defensively (defensive tackles/challenges exceed card frequency). Slight boost: 0.56.
rules_applied.Q5_CIV_more_SOT_2H: Skellam (λ_GER_SOT_2H=3.28, λ_CIV_SOT_2H=1.75): P(CIV>GER)=0.248 (continuous). Adjust for discrete ties: ~0.22. GER heavy 2H dominance (2H result GER=53.25%) makes this a NO lean.
rules_applied.direct_markets: Q3=highest scoring half 2H(0.457); Q7=most cards CIV(0.533); Q8=FTR GER RULE1(0.656); Q10=2H GER OU0.5(0.705).
rules_applied.Q9_cards_estimate: λ_total_cards≈3.1 from OU2.5 (P(≥3)=0.5969). P(≥4|3.1)=0.375. OU3.5 Under illiq=0.5814 implies P(≥4)≈0.42. Use midpoint: 0.40.
rules_applied.Q2_both_SOT_HT: No direct 1H BTTS SOT market. Model: λ_GER_SOT_1H≈2.63→P(GER≥1)=0.928, λ_CIV_SOT_1H≈1.33→P(CIV≥1)=0.735. Combined 0.682. Shade for positive correlation under GER dominance → 0.65.

Q1_CIV_more_fouls.note: No direct fouls market. Cards proxy: most cards CIV=0.5328, CIV -0.5 cards handicap covers=0.5408. CIV as defensive underdog fouls more to break up play — foul rate exceeds card rate. Slight boost from cards baseline → 0.56.

Q2_both_SOT_at_HT.note: No direct 1H BTTS SOT market. Model: λ_GER_SOT_1H=2.63 → P(GER≥1 SOT in 1H)=0.928. λ_CIV_SOT_1H=1.33 → P(CIV≥1 SOT in 1H)=0.735. Combined=0.682. Shade for positive GER dominance correlation → 0.65. CIV has Amad Diallo/Pépé/Wahi — quality enough to threaten.

Q3_2H_more_goals_than_1H.note: DIRECT highest scoring half market: Second Half=0.4574. Trust the market.

Q4_GER_2plus_offsides.note: GER attacking favorite (65.58%) — NOT the defensive-underdog 2+ offsides family. λ_GER_goals=2.20 → λ_GER_off≈1.4. P(≥2|1.4)=0.408. No direct market. Germany press-forward but are organized — not recklessly triggering offside traps. Mild NO lean vs crowd ~0.50.

Q5_CIV_more_SOT_than_GER_2H.note: Skellam P(CIV>GER SOT in 2H) = 0.248 (continuous approximation, λ_GER_SOT_2H=3.28, λ_CIV_SOT_2H=1.75). Adjust for discrete Poisson ties → ~0.22. GER dominates in 2H (2H result GER=53.25%). Strong NO lean — CIV will be defending more than attacking.

Q6_CIV_2plus_offsides.note: 2+ offsides family: CIV win prob 14.09% (10-30% organized mid-block range). Not a blowout risk (GER 65%, draw 20%). CIV will set up defensively but not desperately. λ_CIV_goals=0.966, λ_CIV_off≈0.4-0.6. P(≥2|0.5)=0.090. Apply family floor and modest boost for CIV quality → 0.18. Big YES edge if crowd prices ~0.40-0.45.

Q7_CIV_more_cards_than_GER.note: DIRECT most cards market: Ivory Coast=0.5328. Cross-confirmed by CIV -0.5 cards handicap covers=0.5408. Trust the direct market.

Q8_GER_wins.note: RULE1: FTR market Germany=0.6558 (liquid). avg(crowd_est~0.66, market 0.656) ≈ 0.66.

Q9_4plus_total_cards.note: λ_total_cards≈3.1 from OU2.5 (market P(≥3)=0.5969 → λ=3.1). P(≥4|3.1)=0.375. OU3.5 Under illiq=0.5814 implies P(≥4)≈0.42. Use midpoint: 0.40.

Q10_GER_score_2H.note: DIRECT 2H Germany OU0.5 Over = 0.7051 (liquid). Trust the market.

match_facts.notable: 0 cards for ENTIRE match (0 YC, 0 RC for both teams). CIV led 1-0 at HT. GER comeback with 2 goals in 2H. GER 8 corners, 16 shots, 7 SOT.

Q3_2H_more_goals_than_1H.notes: 2H had 2 goals (GER comeback) vs 1H 1 goal (CIV). outcome=YES. MISS — crowd was closer.

Q6_CIV_2plus_offsides.notes: CIV 1 offside. outcome=NO. MASSIVE beat crowd. 2+ offsides family confirmed again.
